offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, delays in permit submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate the submission process instead of manual submission of permits.
problem: Delays in permit submissions lead to project hold-ups.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
